mapper.select: SELECT id, lesson_id, attend_count, absent_count, attend_rate, interact_count, quiz_count, duration_min, slide_count, ai_summary, ai_key_points, ai_mindmap_json, mindmap_visible, summary_visible, gen_status, created_at, updated_at FROM lesson_report WHERE lesson_id = #{lessonId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE lesson_report SET ai_summary = #{aiSummary}, ai_key_points = #{aiKeyPoints}, ai_mindmap_json = #{aiMindmapJson}, gen_status = #{genStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE lesson_id = #{lessonId}
UPDATE lesson_report SET ai_mindmap_json = #{aiMindmapJson}, gen_status = #{genStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE lesson_id = #{lessonId}
UPDATE lesson_report SET gen_status = #{genStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE lesson_id = #{lessonId}
UPDATE lesson_report SET mindmap_visible = #{visible}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE lesson_id = #{lessonId}
